CheckTitle: Conditional Access policy requires MDM-enrolled compliant device for all users and all cloud apps
Description: A Conditional Access policy requires all users to access all cloud applications only from devices marked as compliant (which implies MDM-enrolled and policy-compliant state).
Risk: If compliant device enforcement is missing, compromised credentials can be used from unmanaged endpoints, increasing exposure to unauthorized access and data exfiltration.

Code.Other:
1. Navigate to Microsoft Entra admin center https://entra.microsoft.com.
2. Go to Protection > Conditional Access > Policies and create or edit a policy.
3. Under Users, include All users.
4. Under Target resources, include All cloud apps.
5. Under Grant, select Grant access and enable Require device to be marked as compliant.
6. If additional grant controls are selected, set Require all the selected controls so compliant device remains mandatory.
7. Set policy to Report-only for validation, then switch to On.

Recommendation.Text: Enforce Conditional Access so all users can access all cloud apps only from compliant devices, ensuring access comes from managed and policy-compliant endpoints.

Notes: Custom check (not mapped to compliance frameworks).
